ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the site's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "depth_range" TEXT /* Typical depth range of the site */,
  "water_currents" TEXT /* Typical water currents at the site */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* General environmental conditions of the site */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "typical_weather_patterns" TEXT /* Typical weather patterns during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was deployed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement quality (e.g., Valid, Invalid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality of the measurement */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the measurement */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Who reviewed the quality of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., environmental, equipment) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
